This page was generated using data obtained on 2023-10-16. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for genus prefixed tags
genus:wikidata and genus:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because genus:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
